query: Write a cold call script for a VP of Sales at Series B SaaS companies. We sell an automated lead scoring tool that reduces manual qualification time for sales reps.
expected_behavior: Produces a speakable opener that states name and company transparently without a generic 'how are you'
Utilizes a permission-based framing structure that explicitly offers the prospect a clean out
Presents 3 specific pain hypotheses covering functional, organizational, and strategic pain points
Asks a single, consequence-focused discovery question
Uses a brief mini-proof point and a meeting ask with two specific day/time options
